html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion

The Gyroscopic Transduction Core is an item that drops from hammering Terramites or Warblers. After defeating the Celestial Scion, it can be used to fix defeated Terramites to make them friendly items that can be picked up. It can also repair broken Terramites to restore its durability back to 100%.

Trivia

  • The Gyroscopic Transduction Core was introduced in the Hostile Takeover update.

Gallery

  • Celestial Scion Concept Art from Hostile Takeover update stream from Rhymes with Play.

The Gyroscopic Transduction Core is an item that drops from hammering Terramites or Warblers. After defeating the Celestial Scion, it can be used to fix defeated Terramites to make them friendly items that can be picked up. It can also repair broken Terramites to restore its durability back to 100%.

The Gyroscopic Transduction Core was introduced in the Hostile Takeover update.

The '''Gyroscopic Transduction Core''' is an item that drops from hammering [[Terramite]]s or [[Warbler]]s. After defeating the [[Celestial Scion]], it can be used to fix defeated Terramites to make them friendly items that can be picked up. It can also repair broken Terramites to restore its durability back to 100%.

== [[File:Placeholder.png|32px|link=]] Trivia ==
* The Gyroscopic Transduction Core was introduced in the [[Hostile Takeover]] update.
